name: MECHARACHNID

abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Extra Parts
abilities.text: Once per activation. After this model kills a model, it may make a Scheme or Remains marker within 1" of the killed model.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.text: This model is unaffected by severe and hazardous terrain.

actions.name: Circular Saw-Blade
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action has a (r), it ignores all (warding) abilities on the target.

triggers.name: Kindle
triggers.text: Target must have a Burning token. Deal 1 damage to the target.

actions.name: Dismantle
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Choose up to two markers within range. Make a Remains marker within 1" of each of the chosen markers. Then, remove one of the chosen markers.

triggers.name: Shooting Sparks
triggers.text: Models within (aura)1" resolve their Burning tokens.

extraction_notes: Model limit is 2, derived from Minion (2) characteristic
